build.stdout:
rm -f nn.out

g++ -g -O3  -fopenmp nearestNeighbor.cpp clutils.cpp utils.cpp -o nn.out \
	-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include -L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/lib64 -lOpenCL \
	-I../util -DTIMING \
	-Wno-unused-result
